rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees involving ports, and in implementation scopes for bindings.
Use only visible identifiers from the AADL model in AGREE annexes.
generic_rules: Ensure AGREE contracts are placed in valid AADL scopes based on whether they reference component ports or implementation details.
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers or types not present in the analyzed AADL model.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Assumptions and guarantees referencing ports should be in component type annexes; assignments in implementation annexes.
anti_patterns: Avoid placing implementation-level bindings in component type scopes or using subcomponent ports in type contracts.
Do not generate assumptions or guarantees for event ports without explicit data values in the model.
irrelevant_topics: Type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
